name: @machine/create-machine-app
description: Scaffold a local-LLM app (Expo / RN / Next / Electron / Node) preconfigured for @machine/activation-sdk.
author: Machine AI Contributors

scripts.test:build: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('.test-dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:build && node .test-dist/tests/run.js
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
